title.en: Ye Xingchen failed and was ostracized by the Ce...

content.en:
Ye Xingchen failed and was ostracized by the Central Domain.

"Father, I haven't been able to defeat the eighth boundary-breaking genius phantom in the Middle Domain!"

Ye Xingchen said ashamedly.

"Very good!" Ye Tian said approvingly.

Subsequently, he asked Ye Xingchen to stay here and not leave.

Wow!

Ye Tian also entered the outer realm of the Ancient Golden Tablet, easily penetrated the phantoms of a Blood Transformation Realm powerhouse, and then defeated a boundary-breaking genius phantom and came to the Middle Domain.

A Boundary-Breaking Genius Phantom in the Middle Domain couldn't stop him at all, and he was directly blasted with his bare hands.

Soon, he faced the last powerhouse phantom, that is, an primeval-level genius phantom.

Facing this primeval-level genius phantom, Ye Tian directly showed two primeval techniques, which were the primeval god and demon fist and the primeval blood spear.

It can be said that by only exposing two primeval techniques, Ye Tian suppressed this primeval-level genius phantom.

......

"Two primeval arts!"

Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, Mo Feather Heavenly Ancestor, and Stygian Sword Heavenly Ancestor were all slightly surprised, after all, they were able to practice two primeval techniques, even if Ye Tian's cultivation was only seven blood transformation realms, it was still very amazing!

"Let's go too!"

Ao Heng rushed directly to the outer realm of the Ancient Golden Tablet.

The Dark Sword Heavenly Ancestor also rushed in one by one, after all, they didn't want Ye Tian to steal the limelight and be the first to enter the inner domain!

But suddenly, Ye Tian showed the third ancient technique-the ancient body!

In a short period of time, Ye Tian directly exploded and killed this primeval-level genius phantom, and the primeval blood spear pierced the opponent's body again and again, completely blowing it up.

After defeating this primordial-level genius phantom, Ye Tian stepped into the inner domain in one step.

"Three Ancient Techniques!"

Mo Yu Heavenly Ancestor was shocked, which force is this genius, he actually cultivated an ancient-level genius who practiced three ancient techniques.

You must know that in the entire primeval territorial waters, there are only a handful of primeval-level geniuses who can practice the three primeval arts, just a few!

"This primeval-level genius has actually practiced three primeval techniques, it's amazing!"

After seeing it, the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor smiled slightly.

He also practiced the three primeval techniques, but the price he paid in order to practice the three primeval techniques was unimaginable, and it was also an opportunity that others could not imagine, and it was a process that could not be replicated!

......

The situation in the inner domain, the powerhouses of the blood transformation realm in the outside world can't see it, an invisible force has blocked it, and only by entering the inner domain can you see the situation in the inner domain.

Now.

Ye Tian stood alone in the inner domain, very close to the Ancient Golden Monument.

Airplanes!!!

A ray of golden light melted into his body as a message, allowing him to know the first assessment of the inner domain.

"Comprehend the first primeval golden inscription!"

The next moment, an ancient golden inscription appeared in his mind, a kind of writing, but it contained an incomparably mysterious power.

"Taikoo Jinwen!"

It was the first time Ye Tian had seen this kind of writing, and he had heard of it before, but this kind of writing could hardly be passed down, and could only be seen on some special items.

Comprehending the primeval golden text is somewhat similar to the technique of comprehending the primeval art, but it is far less difficult than the comprehension of the primeval technique.

However, there is a time limit for the comprehension of the Ancient Golden Text, and if he fails to comprehend this Ancient Golden Text within the time limit, he will fail this first assessment and be removed from the Inner Realm.

Ye Tian didn't know what the use of the ancient golden inscription was, but since it was the assessment of the ancient golden tablet, it must be very useful, so he would talk about it first.

It didn't take long for the Stygian Sword Heavenly Ancestor to come in.

He glanced at Ye Tian and did not disturb Ye Tian.

Soon, the Heavenly Ancestor of the Dark Sword also ushered in the first assessment of the Inner Domain, which was also the comprehension of the Ancient Golden Text.

Of course, this was not the first time he had come to the Swire Golden Script.

"It's a different kind of ancient gold!"

The Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor was not surprised by this at all, after all, if he was given the same Ancient Golden Text, then he would not have to be assessed, and he would directly pass the first assessment.

After the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor, Ao Heng, Moyu Heavenly Ancestor, Black Wind Heavenly King and other primeval-level geniuses also broke into the inner domain.

However, the deputy palace master of the Ice and Snow Palace, the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Breaking Genius Qing Yao Heavenly Ancestor, was defeated by the last primeval-level genius Phantom in the Middle Domain.

This primordial-level genius phantom was an primordial-level genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realms, and she was defeated with a single move. If it weren't for the treasure of the Ancient Gold Stele, she might have been killed directly.

I have to say that no matter how high the cultivation is, it is useless, and it still can't break into the inner domain.

Basically, only primeval-level geniuses can break into the realm of the primeval golden tablet!

......

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the ancient golden text, and gradually felt many mysterious things from this single text.

"The ancient golden text is too mysterious, beyond any kind of writing!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It can be said that the more you understand, the more you understand, and the more you find that you don't understand.

Although it was the first time he had comprehended the primeval script, his comprehension and qualifications were far superior to those of other primeval-level geniuses, after all, he had gathered countless talents all over his body, and the accumulation of these talents had made him an existence that was incomparable to other primeval-level geniuses.

As a result, he had an unimaginable advantage in comprehending the ancient inscriptions.

"Maybe I hope to be the first to complete the first test!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Time flies, Ye Tian continued to comprehend, and finally after a period of time, he completely understood the first ancient golden text - force!

The meaning of this ancient inscription is force, and it is only after thorough understanding that we understand its true meaning.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's body exuded the same aura of light as the Ancient Golden Tablet, which meant that he had completed the first assessment.

At this time, the Dark Sword Heavenly Ancestor, Ao Heng, and Moyu Heavenly Ancestor all looked over one after another, revealing a look of surprise.

"He was the first to complete the first assessment!!!"

The Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor was surprised.

He has participated in many assessments, and he has understood a lot of ancient golden texts, but even so, he is still not as fast as Ye Tiankuai.

"This Endless Heavenly Ancestor is really not simple, maybe there is hope to surpass me in the future!" said the Dark Sword Heavenly Ancestor secretly.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor is amazing!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was shocked.

He had only recently broken into the Inner Domain, and his perception of the Taikoo Jinwen was completely at the point of half-understanding, but Ye Tian had already understood the first Taikoo Jinwen and passed the first assessment.

The Endless Heavenly Ancestor even crushed other primordial-level geniuses, and even the Stygian Sword Heavenly Ancestor, Ao Heng, and Moyu Heavenly Ancestor were not as good as Ye Tian.

He, I have to admire!
